result.stderr:
ProjectVersionUpdater 1.0.1+8ed69501b836a493c487895471855c50f3e517f3
Copyright (C) 2026 Sebastian Kämpfer
USAGE:
Update a project to its next major version.Update all its dependent projects to
the next patch version:
  dotnet update-project --dependants --update Major .\Project.csproj
Update a project to its next minor prerelease version. Update all its dependent
projects to the next patch prerelease version:
  dotnet update-project --dependants --prerelease --update Minor
  .\Project.csproj
Update multiple projects to its next release version. Update all their dependant
projects to the next patch release:
  dotnet update-project --dependants --update Major .\Project.csproj
  .\Project.Abstractions.csproj

  -s, --solution           Path to the solution file the project(s) to update
                           is/are part of. If omitted the next solution file
                           relative to the first provided project path is used.

  -u, --update             Indicates which version part to increase: major,
                           minor or patch. Defaults to 'patch' if omitted.

  -p, --prerelease         Indicates if version update should be a prerelease.

  -n, --name               Use a custom name for prerelease label. If omitted
                           the default naming scheme 'pre' is used.

  -d, --dependants         Indicates if all projects which are (transitevely)
                           dependent on the project to update should be updated
                           as well.

  --help                   Display this help screen.

  --version                Display version information.

  ProjectPaths (pos. 0)    Required. List of paths to the project files to
                           update.

values.name: ProjectPaths
values.description: List of paths to the project files to update.

options.description: Indicates if all projects which are (transitevely) dependent on the project to update should be updated as well.
Use a custom name for prerelease label. If omitted the default naming scheme 'pre' is used.
Indicates if version update should be a prerelease.
Path to the solution file the project(s) to update is/are part of. If omitted the next solution file relative to the first provided project path is used.
Indicates which version part to increase: major, minor or patch. Defaults to 'patch' if omitted.
